description: Wrap an image with transparent background to achieve a specific aspect ratio. Supports custom padding and alignment. The image is modified in place.

filename.description: Path to image file. The file will be modified in place.

ratio.description: Target aspect ratio in format 'width:height' (e.g., '1:1', '16:9'). Default is '1:1'.

padding.description: Additional transparent padding in pixels around the image. Default is 0.

align.description: Alignment of the original image within the new canvas. Format: 'horizontal vertical' (e.g., 'center center', 'top left', 'bottom right'). Default is 'center center'.
